item.title: First reading, referred to Finance.
item.description: First reading, referred to Finance.

item.title: The Week Ahead: January 26-30, 2026 | Washington State House Republicans
item.description: News article "The Week Ahead: January 26-30, 2026 | Washington State House Republicans" from House Republicans.

item.title: 👎Anthony Mixer - Citizen Volunteer Lobbyist
item.description: Anthony Mixer signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Citizen Volunteer Lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Carrie Tellefson - Regence Blue Shield
item.description: Carrie Tellefson signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Regence Blue Shield. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Christine Brewer signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Premera Blue Cross. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Sam Hatzenbeler - Economic Opportunity Institute
item.description: Sam Hatzenbeler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Economic Opportunity Institute.

item.description: Max Martin signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Business.

item.description: Neil Strege signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Roundtable. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Bill Stauffacher signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Coordinated Care of WA. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: David Foster signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Assoc of WA Healthcare Plans. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Kenton Brine signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent NW Insurance Council. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.description: Kris Tefft signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent The American Council of Life Insurers (ACLI).

item.title: 👍Steve Ewing - Dept. of Revenue
item.description: Steve Ewing signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Dept. of Revenue.

item.title: 👍Jim Freeburg - Patient Coalition of Washington
item.description: Jim Freeburg signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Patient Coalition of Washington.

item.title: The Week Ahead (February 9 – 15, 2026) | Washington State House Republicans

item.title: FIN - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: FIN - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: FIN - Majority; do pass.

item.title: WA Democrats drop push for business tax to cover Medicaid costs • Washington State Standard
item.description: News article "WA Democrats drop push for business tax to cover Medicaid costs • Washington State Standard" from Washington State Standard.

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
